calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Sep-20-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for hearing this day for a name change. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Yvonne Lee. Petitioner was sworn and examined. Court ordered name changed to Sam Emadipour Thomas. Decree signed.
